# Onyx Dental Center

> Jakarta's premier smile studio specializing in aesthetic dentistry — veneers, Invisalign, and smile makeovers.

Onyx Dental Center is a premium dental clinic in Tangerang (serving Jakarta, Karawaci, Gading Serpong, and surrounding areas), operated by a team of qualified dentists (drg.) specializing in cosmetic and aesthetic dentistry. The clinic offers veneer installation, Invisalign orthodontic treatment, smile makeovers, dental implants, and general dental care.

## Our Team
- drg. Eka Yesaya — Digital dentistry, smile makeovers, veneers & crowns (13 years experience)
- drg. Rio Jonas, M.Kes, Sert. Ort — Orthodontics, fixed appliance & complex cases, clear aligner (22 years experience)
- drg. Yeheskiel Mursalim — Smile makeovers, veneer & crown restorations (11 years experience)
- drg. Eddy, PhD — Aesthetic restorations, veneers, kids treatment (13 years experience)
- drg. Melisa, Sp.Pros — Dental implant, removable dentures, smile makeover (11 years experience)
- drg. Ovelia Veres — Aesthetic restorations, endodontic treatments (4 years experience)
- drg. Florencia Stephanie — Endodontic treatment, aesthetic restorations, tooth extractions (3 years experience)
- drg. Jazila Afifa — Smile makeovers, endodontic treatments, removable & fixed prosthetics (3 years experience)
- drg. Trisia Bella Kusuma — Smile makeovers, root canal treatment, fixed and removable prosthetics (5 years experience)
- drg. Fikri Al Hafiz — Aesthetic restorations, smile makeover, tooth extractions (4 years experience)

## Services
- Dental Veneers (porcelain and composite)
- Invisalign clear aligner orthodontics
- Smile makeover / full mouth rehabilitation
- Teeth whitening
- Dental implants
- Orthodontic treatments (fixed appliance)
- Endodontic / root canal treatment
- General dentistry

## Location
Ruko Asia Millenium, Jl. Taman Permata No.65 Blok C-1, Binong, Kec. Curug, Kabupaten Tangerang, Banten 15811
Near: Lippo Karawaci, Karawaci, Kelapa Dua, Gading Serpong, Tangerang
